title: NLP-023-how-to-evaluate-nlp-models-key-metrics原理与应用
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-023 How to evaluate NLP models? Key metrics?

 23. How to evaluate NLP models? Key metrics?
答案要点:
分类任务:
- Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1-Score
- ROC-AUC (不平衡数据)

生成任务:
- BLEU (机器翻译)
- ROUGE (摘要)
- METEOR, CIDEr

语义任务:
- Cosine Similarity
- Semantic Textual Similarity (STS)

质量评分: 93/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
